name: construction project managers overseeing 5–10 projects simultaneously tool
description: For construction project managers overseeing 5–10 projects simultaneously, inconsistent reporting causes delays in project timelines. We automate data aggregation and reporting instead of manual data collection and reporting.
target_audience: construction project managers overseeing 5–10 projects simultaneously
problem_solved: Inconsistent and delayed progress reporting from construction sites.
features: simple data input forms for site managers
